docket_entries.description: SC-109 AUTHORIZATINO TO APPEAR. (SARAH HEYWORTH, SR. COLLECTION'F OFFICER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF TTX

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2024 BY SYLVIA HUSING. PLAINTIFF CCSF TTX, REPRESENTED BY (SARAH HEYWORTH, SR. COLLECTION'F OFFICER) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIAM BRIJIL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF TTX RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRIJIL, WILLIAM $1,503.00 PRINCIPAL, $157.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,660.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,503.00 FILED BY CCSF TTX AS TO DEFENDANT BRIJIL, WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2024 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-06-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.
REMARK: CERTIFIED MAIL TO DEFENDANT RETURNED: RETURN TO SENDER, UNCLAIMED, UNABLE TO FORWARD, RETURN TO SENDER. CALENDAR IN DEPT 506, RETURNED MAIL SENT TO DEPT 506.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $157.50 SERVED SEP-26-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BRIJIL, WILLIAM
